name: io.github.korovin-aa97/talkthrough-mcp
description: Turn narrated screen recordings into agent-ready data: local Whisper transcript, scene keyframes, OCR text, wall-clock anchoring. Lazy retrieval tools keep long videos out of the context window.

environmentVariables.name: TALKTHROUGH_WHISPER_MODEL
environmentVariables.description: Whisper model name (tiny|base|small|medium|large-v3). Default: small. Use medium/large-v3 for non-English narration.

environmentVariables.name: TALKTHROUGH_OCR
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'off' to disable OCR of keyframes. Default: on.
